channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Novak Djokovic gets his apologies and is ready to focus on Carlos Alcaraz at the Australian Open
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Novak Djokovic got the mea culpas he wanted from the Australian Open's local broadcaster and its employee who insulted him on the air and so, according to tournament organizers, the 24-time Grand Slam champion is ready to concentrate on his quarterfinal showdown with Carl
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: There's a screw loose at the Australian Open: Sinner's match against Rune delayed by a net problem
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — The screw holding the net in place at the Australian Open's main stadium got jarred loose during defending champion Jannik Sinner's fourth-round match against Holger Rune on Monday, delaying play for about 20 minutes early in the fourth set. The No.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Broadcaster apologizes after Novak Djokovic refuses post-match TV interview at the Australian Open
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — The host broadcaster has apologized after Novak Djokovic declined to do a customary post-match on court interview at the Australian Open Sunday to protest comments made on air by someone who works for the TV network.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Bills will face Chiefs in AFC title game; Eagles will host the Commanders in NFC championship game
item.description: Josh Allen and the Buffalo Bills will take on Patrick Mahomes and the Kansas City Chiefs in the AFC championship game for their fourth playoff matchup in five years. Allen ran for two touchdowns and the Bills beat Lamar Jackson and the Baltimore Ravens 27-25 in a divisional game on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Josh Allen scores 2 TDs, Bills force 3 turnovers to beat Ravens 27-25 and reach AFC title game
item.description: The Bills closed their season a perfect 10-0 at home, including a 30-21 win over the previously unbeaten Chiefs in Week 11.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Barkley runs for 78- and 62-yard TDs in the snow and Eagles top Rams 28-22 to head to NFC title game
item.description: Saquon Barkley dashed through the snow for touchdown runs of 78 and 62 yards and finished with 205 yards rushing
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Josh Allen scores 2 TDs, Bills force 3 turnovers to beat Ravens 27-25 and reach AFC title game
item.description: Josh Allen rushed for two touchdowns, Buffalo’s defense forced three turnovers and the Bills advanced to the AFC championship game with a 27-25 win over the Baltimore Ravens in the divisional round.
item.dc:creator: John Wawrow, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Elina Svitolina rallies to reach the Australian Open quarterfinals for the third time
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Elina Svitolina rallied from 4-1 down and took 11 of the next 12 games in a 6-4, 6-1 victory over Veronika Kudermetova on Monday to reach the Australian Open quarterfinals for the third time.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Eagles' Saquon Barkley blows past Rams' Jared Verse for TD after rookie's comments about Philly fans
item.description: Philadelphia Eagles star running back Saquon Barkley blew past Los Angeles Rams linebacker Jared Verse in the first quarter of their playoff game.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Travis Kelce feeling '22' after delivering best game of season in Chiefs' playoff win
item.description: Kansas City Chiefs star tight end Travis Kelce gave a nod to his girlfriend, Taylor Swift, when he was asked how he felt following a playoff win over the Houston Texans.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: More turmoil for Man United and Tottenham but Nottingham Forest's title challenge strengthens
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — Manchester United’s season lurched further into turmoil Sunday after a 3-1 loss to Brighton in the Premier League. Goals from Yankuba Minteh, Kaoru Mitoma and Georginio Rutter at Old Trafford consigned United to a 10th defeat in the league.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NL Rookie of the Year Paul Skenes isn't ready to think about the long term in Pittsburgh
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Paul Skenes has a lot on his mind. The chances of the perpetually curious National League Rookie of the Year staying with the Pittsburgh Pirates indefinitely is not one of them. Not yet anyway.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Man United boss Ruben Amorim thinks this might be the worst team in the club's history
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — Ruben Amorim delivered a withering assessment of his Manchester United team after its latest loss, admitting it might be the “worst” side in the club's storied history.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Draymond Green apologizes for Jordan Poole punch after Warriors beat Wizards
item.description: Jordan Poole said he loves "most of" the Warriors, and Draymond Green understood why his former teammate made that clarification.
item.dc:creator: Michael Nowels, The Mercury News

item.title: Tom Brady receives praise for observation at crucial point of Lions-Commanders playoff game
item.description: Tom Brady received praise on Saturday night for making an astute observation during a crucial point of the Washington Commanders' win over the Detroit Lions.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dodgers continue offseason dominance, sign All-Star reliever
item.description: As the Los Angeles Dodgers stormed toward the World Series last October, one weakness was consistently brought up for the Boys in Blue: relief pitching.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: FOX Sports provides TVs to firefighters battling LA wildfires
item.description: FOX Sports came in clutch this weekend as they provided televisions to firefighters battling the Los Angeles wildfires so they can watch some NFL playoff games.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: DIMES: Steph Curry and the plight of the superstar/GM
item.description: Unlike other superstars in his position, Steph Curry is caretaking the organization by cautioning against reckless trades.
item.dc:creator: Danny Emerman, The Mercury News

item.title: Coco Gauff drops a set but reaches the Australian Open quarterfinals. Sabalenka wins, too
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Coco Gauff's consecutive-set streak ended at the Australian Open. Her bid for a second Grand Slam title continued on Sunday with a 5-7, 6-2, 6-1 comeback victory over Belinda Bencic in the fourth round.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Travis Kelce makes NFL history in first game of three-peat quest
item.description: Once again, Travis Kelce has broken a record at Arrowhead Stadium after catching a pass from Patrick Mahomes.
item.dc:creator: Dillon Seckington, KTLA 5

item.title: Runnin' Utes hold off BYU in overtime, 73-72
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Ezra Ausar scored a career-high 26 points on 11-of-15 shooting and Hunter Erickson scored Utah's last six points on Saturday night to help the Runnin' Utes beat BYU 73-72 in overtime.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Turnovers and depleted defense contribute to top-seeded Lions' quick playoff exit
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — The Detroit Lions had everything set up the way they wanted this time. After losing last season's NFC championship game at San Francisco, they went 15-2 to earn the NFC's top seed.
item.dc:creator: DAVE HOGG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Stephen Curry considered day to day after injuring left ankle in win over Wizards
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Stephen Curry injured his left ankle in the final minutes of the Golden State Warriors victory over Washington on Saturday night and is considered day to day. Curry left the game with just over a minute to play after getting tangled with the Wizards' Jordan Poole.
item.dc:creator: ERIC HE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Duke freshman Cooper Flagg returns to New England and gives Maine fans a show against BC
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Duke freshman Cooper Flagg won’t be making it all the way up to Maine, so his fans trekked to Chestnut Hill on Saturday night to see the likely No. 1 overall draft pick play Boston College in his only game in New England this season.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: San Diego FC players react to first week of practice
item.description: The "Chrome & Azul" are back on the training ground to finish off their first week of training, for the first time ever as a club.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Neff injured in Red Rocks win over Iowa State
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The #4 Utah gymnastics team came away with an easy victory over Iowa State in its Big 12 Conference opener Friday night, but it came at a price.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ball and Bridges lead Hornets to wild 125-123 win over Bulls
item.description: LaMelo Ball scored 26 points, Miles Bridges had 21 and the Charlotte Hornets held on for a wild 125-123 win over the Chicago Bulls on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Sammy Sosa gets warm reception for his reconciliation with the Chicago Cubs
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Sammy Sosa jogged onto the stage, carrying an American flag. The crowd cheered wildly. It was just like old times — only Sosa was dressed in a suit, and the scene occurred in a downtown hotel ballroom instead of Wrigley Field.
item.dc:creator: JAY COHEN, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Several Chicagoland AMC locations to air the College Football Playoff championship game
item.description: CHICAGO — Notre Dame will face off against Ohio State on Monday in the College Football Playoff championship game in Atlanta, and while traveling to the game may not be an option for some, fans in Chicago can still get a taste of the larger-than-life action at some AMC theaters.
item.dc:creator: Gabriel Castillo, WGN 9

item.title: Hall of Fame broadcaster Dick Vitale returns to the air
item.description: Legendary ESPN broadcaster Dick Vitale will be returning to air on Jan. 25 for the first time since 2023.
item.dc:creator: Alaina Papazian, WFLA, NBC

item.title: CMU baseball, softball picked to top RMAC in 2025
item.description: In the RMAC preseason coaches poll, both CMU Baseball and CMU softball were selected to top the conference.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Utah HC's youngest player having big impact
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Logan Cooley may only be 20 years old, but it is scary to think where the Utah Hockey Club would be without him this year. Cooley can't even drink legally, and he is second on the team in points with 12 goals and 25 assists.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Plateau Valley’s Jack Vig Joins Elite Club with 1,000-Point Milestone
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— Plateau Valley High School senior Jack Vig recently reached a milestone few high school basketball players achieve — a 1,000-point career “It just felt like another two points for my career. It wasn’t a big deal for me.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Bob Uecker, colorful comedian and Baseball Hall of Famer, dies
item.description: From his time as a backup catcher to appearances on Johnny Carson's late night show to his more than five decades in the broadcast booth, people far and wide knew Bob Uecker.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, KRON4

item.title: White Sox announce 16 signings in 2025 international class
item.description: The Chicago White Sox have agreed to terms with 16 international players, including two ranked in the Top 100 available prospects, Alejandro Cruz and Orlando Patiño, and other prospects with potential.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Bruins open 4-goal lead, add 2 short-handed empty-netters to beat Lightning 6-2
item.description: David Pastrnak had a goal and two assists and Parker Wotherspoon scored his first NHL goal on Tuesday night to help the Boston Bruins open a four-goal lead and hold on to beat the Tampa Bay Lightning 6-2.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Rams host wild-card playoff game nearly 400 miles east of LA because of wildfires
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — The Los Angeles Rams made themselves at home on Monday night for their NFL wild-card playoff game against the Minnesota Vikings — even if their adopted stadium featured an unusual amount of red and was nearly 400 miles east of their regular venue.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, NewsNation
